programmes.show_name: Everything Is Fake and Nobody Cares
programmes.show_description: Dr Aseem Malhotra reaches millions with claims about Covid vaccines - and fears the BBC. The question isn't if he's right, but why so many think he is. Jamie Bartlett meets him.

programmes.show_name: Power to the People: Rewiring Britain
programmes.show_description: From electricity generated off the north coast of Scotland to the power socket in your living room, Douglas Fraser examines the scale and the challenges of rewiring Britain.

programmes.show_name: Amy Annette: I Survived the Noughties
programmes.show_description: Award-winning comedian Amy Annette survived the Noughties. Now they're back, and she's here to help you navigate the re-emergence of the era of the low-rise jean.
